search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicespacketlossbydevice" $orgid$ | eval direction = mvappend("downstream", "upstream") | mvexpand direction | eval loss_percentage = if(direction="downstream", 'downstream.lossPercentage', 'upstream.lossPercentage') | rename network.name as "Network" | timechart span=1h avg(loss_percentage) as "Loss Percentage" by "Network"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicespacketlossbydevice" $orgid$ | eval direction = mvappend("Downstream", "Upstream") | mvexpand direction | eval total_packets = if(direction="Downstream", 'downstream.total', 'upstream.total') | eval lost_packets = if(direction="Downstream", 'downstream.lost', 'upstream.lost') | rename direction as "Direction" | stats sum(total_packets) as "Total Packets" sum(lost_packets) as "Lost Packets" by "Direction"

panel.title: Top Networks with High Packet Loss

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicespacketlossbydevice" $orgid$ | rename upstream.lost as upstream_loss ,downstream.lost as downstream_loss, upstream.total as upstream_total ,downstream.total as downstream_total | eval avg_loss=((upstream_loss + downstream_loss) / (upstream_total+downstream_total)) * 100 | stats avg(avg_loss) as avg_loss by network.id, network.name | eval avg_loss=round(avg_loss,2) | where avg_loss > 0 | sort - avg_loss | rename network.name as "Network Name", avg_loss as "Average Loss" | table "Network Name", "Average Loss"
